contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Fix /agroverse/qr-code-check 404 — register router with /agroverse prefix
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/115
  
  Details:
  Live nginx now routes /agroverse/* to the Python dao_protocol service, but the qr_code_check router only handled /qr-code-check (bare). Physical QR labels encode /agroverse/qr-code-check, which was returning {"detail":"Not Found"} from FastAPI. Root caused by inspecting nginx config drift (mirror stale vs live), testing both URL paths, and confirmed through Sophía bastion. Fix: registered qr_code_check router with /agroverse prefix in main.py (alongside existing bare registration). Deployed via Sophía bastion to dao_protocol_nelanco:8010. Verified both paths return correct 302/200 responses.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
